Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I was going to write that you should fix the other warnings in the same patch instead of one per patch, but I guess that this is only to fix the parent, and I see you pushed a second patch to clean up the other warnings.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> I was going to write that you should fix the other warnings in the same patch instead of one per patch, but I guess that this is only to fix the parent, and I see you pushed a second patch to clean up the other warnings.

this particular patch is separate because of the patch in master-next about to land that would otherwise conflict with the report so I had to base it on top.
Everything that did not conflict went into the big patch based on top of master.

Abandoned

addressed in the original patch

parents.subject: LU-8066 ofd: migrate files out of procfs

commit.subject: LU-18959 ofd: declare ldebugfs_ofd_obd_vars static
commit.message:
LU-18959 ofd: declare ldebugfs_ofd_obd_vars static

It's not used anywhere out of this file, so
let's prevent namespace pollution by declaring it static.

Change-Id: I9b202b0fa3f113bf374a71d4d83a3467de3952fd
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
